Its latest move takes the fight somewhere new, to the inside of a humanoid robot. The chipmaker has agreed to supply the compute for machines built by Foundation, a San Francisco startup whose backers include Eric Trump. The agreement, announced on 23 July, pushed Amkor shares up by roughly 12% in after-hours trading.
